title: RBSE 12th Result highlights: Link for results activated on rajeduboard.rajasthan.gov.in; check toppers' names here
description: RBSE 12th Result highlights: The Rajasthan Board Class 12 results have been declared on rajeduboard.rajasthan.gov.in. for all streams. The link to check the results has been activated. Candidates can also check results on the HT Education page.
